# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

This is a personal learning repository containing study notes and practice code.
If you find a security vulnerability — for example, accidentally exposed credentials
or code with security implications — please open a private report.

Go to https://github.com/AlessioBrillo/from-gradient-to-transformer/security/advisories
to report an advisory privately. Do not open a public Issue for security concerns.

I will address confirmed reports as soon as possible.
